case_title: LAW OFFICES OF WILLIAM WEBB FARRER VS TONG GROUP INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,597.39 FILED BY LAW OFFICES OF WILLIAM WEBB FARRER AS TO DEFENDANT TONG GROUP INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2004 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
